title: Sarcochilus compressus
taxonomy: Sarcochilus compressus is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Sarcochilus is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. This classification places Sarcochilus compressus within the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. Further, Sarcochilus compressus can be classified as a monocot due to its characteristics.
